title: AXBarChartData
description: Interface defining the structure of individual data items for bar charts

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: The complete TypeScript interface definition for bar chart data items

props.name: value
props.description: Numeric value represented by the bar height

props.name: tooltipLabel
props.description: Optional tooltip label for the bar

props.name: color
props.description: Optional custom color for this specific bar
